PREFIX ps: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/statement/>
PREFIX p: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/>
PREFIX wd: <http://www.wikidata.org/entity/>
PREFIX rdfs: <http://www.w3.org/2000/01/rdf-schema#>
PREFIX pq: <http://www.wikidata.org/prop/qualifier/>
SELECT ?supplier(GROUP_CONCAT(?startLabel ; SEPARATOR = ", ") AS ?startTimes)(GROUP_CONCAT(?endLabel ; SEPARATOR = ", ") AS ?endTimes) WHERE {
  wd:Q18656 p:P5995 ?statement .
  ?statement ps:P5995 ?supplier .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P580 ?start .
    ?start rdfs:label ?startLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?startLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
  OPTIONAL {
    ?statement pq:P582 ?end .
    ?end rdfs:label ?endLabel .
    FILTER(LANG(?endLabel) = "en")
  }
  .
  ?supplier rdfs:label ?supplierLabel .
  FILTER(LANG(?supplierLabel) = "en")
  .
  FILTER(CONTAINS(LCASE(?supplierLabel) , "adidas"))
}
GROUP BY ?supplier
